title: Croatian-Style Smoked Tofu Skewers
description: A vegan twist on traditional skewers, featuring smoky tofu and Croatian-inspired flavors.

ingredients.name: tofu
ingredients.notes: extra-firm, drained and cut into 1-inch cubes

ingredients.name: skewers
ingredients.notes: soak in water for 30 minutes before use

instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together Croatian herb mix and olive oil.
Add the tofu cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated tofu onto the skewers.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the tofu is golden brown and crispy.
Serve hot, garnished with additional Croatian herb mix if desired.
